channel.title: Securin — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Securin (securin).

item.title: CVE-2024-47097 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in Follet School Solutions Destiny
item.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Follet School Solutions Destiny before v22.0.1 AU1 allows a remote attacker to run arbitrary client-side code via the site parameter of handleloginform.do.

item.title: CVE-2024-47096 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in Follet School Solutions Destiny
item.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Follet School Solutions Destiny before v22.0.1 AU1 allows a remote attacker to run arbitrary client-side code via the showSupportExpiredMessage parameter of handleloginform.do.

item.title: CVE-2026-7837 · 3.7 LOW — TOCTOU with root privilege in ad_flush
item.description: A time-of-check time-of-use (TOCTOU) condition in the ad_flush function in Netatalk 3.0.0 through 4.4.2 involves root-privileged file operations, which may allow a remote attacker to cause limited data modification under specific race conditions.

item.title: CVE-2026-44075 · 3.7 LOW — Missing break in DSI OpenSession
item.description: A missing break statement in DSI OpenSession processing in Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.4.2 causes a DSIOPT_ATTNQUANT switch case to fall through into DSIOPT_SERVQUANT, resulting in unintended session option handling that may allow a remote attacker to c…

item.title: CVE-2026-44074 · 3.7 LOW — Bitwise OR of errno values
item.description: Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 combines multiple errno values using bitwise OR, resulting in incorrect error codes when multiple error conditions occur simultaneously, which may allow a remote attacker to cause a minor service disruption via conditions…

item.title: CVE-2026-44071 · 3.7 LOW — FORTIFY_SOURCE disabled
item.description: Netatalk 3.1.2 through 4.4.2 is compiled without FORTIFY_SOURCE, which disables built-in buffer overflow detection at runtime, potentially allowing a remote attacker to cause a minor denial of service via memory errors that would otherwise be caught…

item.title: CVE-2026-44057 · 3.1 LOW — Dead bounds check in Spotlight RPC unmarshaller
item.description: A dead bounds check in the Spotlight RPC unmarshaller in Netatalk 3.0.0 through 4.4.2 results in an unreachable code path that provides no effective bounds protection, which may allow a remote authenticated attacker to obtain limited information via…

item.title: CVE-2026-7836 · 3.1 LOW — hextoint macro uppercase bug
item.description: An incorrect calculation in the hextoint macro in Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2 due to improper uppercase character handling allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause limited data modification via crafted hexadecimal input.

item.title: CVE-2026-7835 · 3.1 LOW — Format string argument mismatch
item.description: A format string argument mismatch in Netatalk 3.0.3 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause a minor denial of service via crafted input that triggers incorrect format string processing.

item.title: CVE-2026-44076 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Shell injection via volume path
item.description: Insufficient sanitization of volume paths in Netatalk 3.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a local privileged user to inject OS commands and execute arbitrary code via a crafted volume path.

item.title: CVE-2026-44073 · 4 MEDIUM — seteuid failure ignored in auth modules
item.description: Authentication modules in Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.4.2 fail to check the return value of seteuid(), which may allow a remote authenticated attacker to retain elevated privileges under error conditions.

item.title: CVE-2026-44072 · 2.5 LOW — system() after failed chdir()
item.description: Netatalk 2.2.1 through 4.4.2 calls system() after a failed chdir() without properly handling the error condition, which allows a local privileged user to execute unintended commands or cause a minor service disruption under specific conditions.

item.title: CVE-2026-44070 · 3.1 LOW — Unbounded realloc in charset conversion
item.description: An unbounded memory reallocation in the charset conversion code in Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause a minor denial of service via crafted character conversion requests.

item.title: CVE-2026-44069 · 3.4 LOW — Integer underflow in volxlate
item.description: An integer underflow in the volxlate function in Netatalk 3.0.0 through 4.4.2 allows a local privileged user to obtain limited information, modify limited data, or cause a minor service disruption via crafted volume translation input.

item.title: CVE-2026-44068 · 7.6 HIGH — EA path traversal via incomplete sanitization
item.description: Incomplete sanitization of extended attribute (EA) path components in Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to write to files outside the intended metadata namespace via crafted EA names.

item.title: CVE-2026-44067 · 3.7 LOW — EA header parsing heap over-read
item.description: A heap over-read in extended attribute (EA) header parsing in Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to obtain limited information or cause a minor service disruption via crafted EA data.

item.title: CVE-2026-44066 · 7.1 HIGH — Heap out-of-bounds reads in Spotlight RPC unmarshalling
item.description: Multiple heap out-of-bounds reads in the Spotlight RPC unmarshalling code in Netatalk 3.1.0 through 4.4.2 allow a remote authenticated attacker to obtain sensitive information or cause a minor service disruption.

item.title: CVE-2026-44065 · 3.7 LOW — Off-by-two in papd lp_write()
item.description: An off-by-two error in lp_write() in papd in Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2 allows an adjacent network attacker to modify limited data or cause a minor service disruption via crafted print data.

item.title: CVE-2026-44064 · 7.1 HIGH — ASP session ID out-of-bounds access
item.description: An out-of-bounds read in ASP session ID handling in Netatalk 1.3 through 4.4.2 allows an adjacent network attacker to obtain limited information or cause a denial of service via a crafted ASP request.

item.title: CVE-2026-44063 · 4.2 MEDIUM — LDAP filter injection
item.description: An LDAP injection vulnerability in Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to manipulate LDAP queries and obtain limited information or modify LDAP entries via crafted filter input.

item.title: CVE-2026-44062 · 7.5 HIGH — Missing o_len bounds check in pull_charset_flags()
item.description: A missing output length bounds check in pull_charset_flags() in Netatalk 2.0.4 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service via crafted character set data.

item.title: CVE-2026-44061 · 5.9 MEDIUM — DES-ECB auth with timing side channel
item.description: Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.4.2 uses DES-ECB for authentication with a timing side channel, which allows a remote attacker to recover authentication credentials via timing analysis.

item.title: CVE-2026-44060 · 7.5 HIGH — Integer underflow in dsi_writeinit() leads to denial of service
item.description: An integer underflow in dsi_writeinit() in Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to cause a denial of service via a crafted DSI write request.

item.title: CVE-2026-44059 · 3.9 LOW — Non-reentrant privilege toggle
item.description: A race condition in the privilege toggle mechanism in Netatalk 2.2.5 through 4.4.2 allows a local attacker to obtain limited information, modify limited data, or cause a minor service disruption.

item.title: CVE-2026-44058 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Authentication bypass via admin auth user
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability in Netatalk 2.2.2 through 4.4.2 allows a remote privileged user to authenticate as an arbitrary user via the admin auth user mechanism.

item.title: CVE-2026-44056 · 6 MEDIUM — Stack buffer overflow in desktop.c
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow in desktop.c in Netatalk 1.3 through 4.2.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause a denial of service, obtain limited information, or modify limited data.

item.title: CVE-2026-44055 · 7.5 HIGH — Bitwise OR logic bug enables shell injection
item.description: A logic error involving bitwise OR operations in Netatalk 3.1.4 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to inject OS commands and execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2026-44054 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Predictable afpd session token
item.description: Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2 generates AFP session tokens derived from predictable process IDs, which allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause a denial of service by exploiting the reconnect mechanism.

item.title: CVE-2026-44053 · 7.4 HIGH — Weak cryptography in DHCAST128 UAM
item.description: Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.2.2 uses a broken cryptographic algorithm in the DHCAST128 UAM, which allows a remote attacker to obtain authentication credentials or impersonate a user via cryptanalytic attack.

item.title: CVE-2026-44052 · 7.5 HIGH — LDAP simple-bind password exposure in log output
item.description: Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 inserts LDAP simple-bind passwords into log output in cleartext, which allows an attacker with access to the log files to obtain LDAP credentials.

item.title: CVE-2026-44051 · 8.1 HIGH — Arbitrary file read via attacker-controlled symlink creation
item.description: An improper link resolution vulnerability in Netatalk 3.0.2 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files or overwrite arbitrary files via attacker-controlled symlink creation.

item.title: CVE-2026-44050 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Heap buffer overflow in CNID daemon comm_rcv()
item.description: A heap-based buffer overflow in the CNID daemon comm_rcv() function in Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code with escalated privileges or cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-44049 · 7.5 HIGH — Out-of-bounds write in convert_charset() null termination
item.description: An out-of-bounds write due to improper null termination in convert_charset() in Netatalk 2.0.4 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service via crafted character data.

item.title: CVE-2026-44048 · 8.8 HIGH — Stack buffer overflow via UCS-2 type confusion in convert_charset()
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow via UCS-2 type confusion in convert_charset() in Netatalk 2.0.4 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-44047 · 8.8 HIGH — SQL injection in MySQL CNID backend
item.description: An SQL injection vulnerability in the MySQL CNID backend in Netatalk 3.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to obtain unauthorized access to data, modify data, or cause a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-42376 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — D-Link DIR-456U A1 Hardcoded Telnet Backdoor Credentials
item.description: D-Link DIR-456U Hardware Revision A1 (End-of-Life, EOL) contains a hardcoded telnet backdoor. The device starts a telnet daemon at boot via /etc/init0.d/S80telnetd.sh with the username "Alphanetworks" and the static password "whdrv01_dlob_dir456U" re…

item.title: CVE-2026-42375 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — D-Link DIR-600L A1 Hardcoded Telnet Backdoor Credentials
item.description: D-Link DIR-600L Hardware Revision A1 (End-of-Life) contains a hardcoded telnet backdoor. The device starts a telnet daemon at boot via /bin/telnetd.sh with the username "Alphanetworks" and the static password "wrgn35_dlwbr_dir600l" read from /etc/alp…

item.title: CVE-2026-42374 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — D-Link DIR-600L B1 Hardcoded Telnet Backdoor Credentials
item.description: D-Link DIR-600L Hardware Revision B1 (End-of-Life) contains a hardcoded telnet backdoor. The device starts a telnet daemon at boot via /bin/telnetd.sh with the username "Alphanetworks" and the static password "wrgn61_dlwbr_dir600L" read from /etc/alp…

item.title: CVE-2026-42373 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — D-Link DIR-605L B2 Hardcoded Telnet Backdoor Credentials
item.description: D-Link DIR-605L Hardware Revision B2 (End-of-Life, EOL) contains a hardcoded telnet backdoor. The device starts a telnet daemon at boot via /bin/telnetd.sh with the username "Alphanetworks" and the static password "wrgn76_dlwbr_dir605L" read from /et…

item.title: CVE-2026-42372 · 8.8 HIGH 👻 — D-Link DIR-605L A1 Hardcoded Telnet Backdoor Credentials
item.description: D-Link DIR-605L Hardware Revision A1 (End-of-Life, EOL) contains a hardcoded telnet backdoor. The device starts a telnet daemon at boot via /bin/telnetd.sh with the username "Alphanetworks" and the static password "wrgn35_dlwbr_dir605l" read from /et…

item.title: CVE-2026-6057 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Path Traversal in FalkorDB Browser Leads to Remote Code Execution
item.description: FalkorDB Browser 1.9.3 contains an unauthenticated path traversal vulnerability in the file upload API that allows remote attackers to write arbitrary files and achieve remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-5525 · 6 MEDIUM — Stack-Based Buffer Overflow in Notepad++ File Drop Handler leads to DoS
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in Notepad++ version 8.9.3 in the file drop handler component. When a user drags and drops a directory path of exactly 259 characters without a trailing backslash, the application appends a backslash…

item.title: CVE-2024-47095 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in Follet School Solutions Destiny
item.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in Follet School Solutions Destiny before v22.0.1 AU1 allows a remote attacker to run arbitrary client-side code via the expiredSupportMessage parameter of handleloginform.do.
